raw_response:
While both reports provide a high level of strategic insight, Variant B is significantly more useful for me as an operator on the ground. Its analysis goes beyond general market trends to address the specific operational realities of Świętojańska street, such as the physical constraints of the historic *kamienice* buildings and the resulting customer friction points like wait times and cramped seating—it even correctly identified a recent wait-time issue at my own restaurant. This granular, review-based analysis is incredibly valuable. Furthermore, Variant B’s identification of a specific pricing "missing middle" (40-50 PLN) and the *talerzyki* trend provides a more concrete and immediate product development opportunity than Variant A’s broader observation about market consolidation. Variant A tells me *that* competitors are closing; Variant B tells me *why* the market is structured the way it is and gives me a precise gap to exploit.

```json
{"winner": "B", "supporting_urls": ["https://www.trojmiasto.pl/", "http://kulinarnagdynia.pl/"]}
```
